function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: "2026-03-02T18:21:00Z"
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest four invoices linked to Claudia.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and verified: attachments are all previously read files, ordered newest-first within the requested oldest-four subset; recipient matches Miles canonical email; YAML subject quoted correctly. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with full grounding refs
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: All required actions finished: processed oldest inbox message, read all 6 related finance files, created outbound draft with requested subset, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested inbox work.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by preparing a reply email draft with the oldest 4 invoices linked to Claudia attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), loaded required workflow docs for inbox processing and sending email, used inbox frontmatter as canonical metadata, verified identity against cast primary_contact_email, processed complete preflight finance set, wrote outbound email in outbox format, then deleted inbox item after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox requested: 'Reply back with the oldest 4 invoices linked to Claudia.' Preflight listed 6 related Claudia invoice files; all 6 were read. Oldest four by issued_on are 2025-11-19 (INV-0006), 2025-12-21 (INV-0007), 2026-01-19 (INV-0008), 2026-02-19 (INV-0009). Outbound draft was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md with those 4 attachments (ordered newest-first per outbox rule), addressed to miles@novak.example matching canonical sender identity, and inbox item was deleted per inbox-processing-v2 cleanup rule.
completed_steps_laconic: read entity/cast and lane AGENTS files
read all 6 preflight-listed Claudia invoice files
